asan.evidence_summary: ASan harness produced no sanitizer crash and could not confirm the issue against the supplied shipped artifacts.

lldb.evidence_summary: Runtime tracing showed unchecked large frame lengths and a lossy size_t to uint32_t output framing cast.

fresh.evidence_summary: Fresh review independently identified the 32-bit output length truncation risk in DoTestIo().

impact.evidence_summary: A rebuilt demo showed local resource exhaustion potential and framing desynchronization, but only in the test-only conformance binary.

notes: Consensus supports a real logic flaw in DoTestIo(), but confidence is tempered because ASan did not reproduce memory corruption and the impact is limited to the conformance executable rather than shipped library APIs.
